E16 - Murder, He Wrote
programme.desc: Elsbeth organizes a book club to investigate a celebrated novelist (Griffin Dunne) who may have written the perfect crime.

programme.title: E5 - Falsetto
programme.desc: Maggie partners with Eva to hunt a killer after a shocking daytime stabbing in an NYC park. After a subsequent murder, they realize the assassin has a hit list, begging the question: “Who's on it and who's next?”

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: Oscar(R) winner Matt Damon stars in this action-packed thriller about an elite government agent who is pulled from the sea with two bullets in his back and no memory of his violent past.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team up in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: Bioscopewala
programme.desc: A woman meets her dead father's old friend, who was the operator of a Bioscope show that she loved in her childhood. Connecting India and Afghanistan, a story of love and cinema unfolds. Release Year: 2017 Director: Deb Medhekar Awards: 2018 Nominee FOI Online Award - Best Screenplay Adapted - Deb Medhekar, Radhika Anand

programme.title: Student Of The Year
programme.desc: Dean Vashisht is sick, bringing former students back. They remember their college days, especially the 'Student of the Year' contest, which changed their lives. Release Year: 2012 Director: Karan Johar Awards: President's Honour Award: Karan Johar Apsara Film Producers Guild Awards; Best Breakthrough Performance Male: Sidharth Malhotra, Dream Director: Karan Johar Stardust awards; Best Song of the Year: Udit Narayan, Shreya Ghoshal Zee Cine Awards

programme.title: The Godfather
programme.desc: A chilling portrait of the Sicilian clan's rise and near fall from power in America, featuring searing performances by Marlon Brando, Al Pacino and James Caan.

programme.title: The Godfather

programme.title: Journey To The Center Of The Earth
programme.desc: Trapped in a cave, a trio’s only hope of escape is to go deep into the center of the Earth as they race against a volcanic eruption to reach the surface.

programme.title: Journey To The Center Of The Earth
programme.desc: Trapped in a cave, a trio’s only hope of escape is to go deep into the center of the Earth as they race against a volcanic eruption to reach the surface.

programme.title: Under The Hawthorn Tree
programme.desc: Romance sparks between a young woman and a young man during China's Cultural Revolution.

programme.title: Saturday Blockbusters: Chasing Greatness: Race For Glory: Audi Vs. Lancia
programme.desc: Germany and Italy develop an intense race car rivalry at the 1983 Rally World Championship.

programme.title: Moving (Digitally Restored)
programme.desc: A young girl struggles to deal with her parents' divorce.

programme.title: Moving (Digitally Restored)

programme.title: E3 - Magic Pets Football Fun!
programme.desc: Join Morphle, Mila, and Jordie as they face off against the Magic Pets in a wild soccer match! With Incra and Telepup using their powers, Team Morphle will have to get creative to win the trophy. It’s a magical, winner-take-all game!

programme.title: E1 - From Waterfalls to Outer Space!
programme.desc: Join Gecko on his biggest adventures yet, from waterfalls to outer space! First, when Grandma's caravan rolls into a river & heads for a waterfall, Gecko must perform a daring chase to save her! Then, a lovely day at the beach becomes perilous when some vehicles get caught in the tide, requiring a helicopter rescue. The adventure blasts off as the Mechs accidentally launch their homemade spaceship to the moon & need to use solar power to get home!

programme.title: E5 - Twinkle Bedtime Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E3 - Cody’s Football Season Training Camp
programme.desc: Get ready for game day with Cody's training camp! Imagine racing on extreme motor trikes, join friends on the playground, and go on a fun family hike. Learn about healthy foods at the grocery store to get strong for the big football season!

programme.title: E3 - Cody’s Football Season Training Camp
programme.desc: Get ready for game day with Cody's training camp! Imagine racing on extreme motor trikes, join friends on the playground, and go on a fun family hike. Learn about healthy foods at the grocery store to get strong for the big football season!

programme.title: E19 - JJ's Family Love & Healthy Habits!
programme.desc: Celebrate family love & healthy habits with JJ! It's JJ's birthday, & his animal friends are setting up a surprise party! Then, learn about eating healthy snacks & veggies with Mommy. The family fun continues with a game of Peekaboo, cleaning up for Valentine's Day & making mashed potatoes together! Plus, say thank you to moms on Mother's Day & watch JJ's parents have a romantic candlelight dinner!

programme.title: E3 - Magic Pets Football Fun!
programme.desc: Join Morphle, Mila, and Jordie as they face off against the Magic Pets in a wild soccer match! With Incra and Telepup using their powers, Team Morphle will have to get creative to win the trophy. It’s a magical, winner-take-all game!

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: It's time to play JJ's favorite games! Join Ms. Appleberry & the Melon Patch kids as they play 'follow the leader' & have a contest to see who can make the silliest funny face. Then, JJ & his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes & the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: E706 - Road Trip: Bringing Down the House / Road Trip: Mountain Hard Pass
programme.desc: During a visit of the White House, the Loud kids can't help but sneak off and explore the rooms not on the tour. // Intimidated by an intense day of hiking in the Rocky Mountains, the Loud kids try to find reasons to call off the hike.

programme.title: E208 - Freaky Fri-Day-Day
programme.desc: A face-swap app causes Lay Lay and Sadie to switch bodies, forcing both girls to live a day in the other's shoes before they can resolve the issue.

programme.title: E711 - Leave No Van Behind / Sponsor Tripped
programme.desc: Vanzilla breaks down. // Lynn and friends enjoy free perks around Royal Wood.

programme.title: E110 - The Meatball of Canyon Valley / Sticky Fingers
programme.desc: When Halmoni chooses Jack over Lil to be her Trot dance competition partner, jealous Lil seeks revenge. / Min asks Jack to run a simple errand, but Charlie the gibbon intervenes, sending Jack and Lil chasing after him into the town's abandoned mines.

programme.title: E321 - Curse of the WereDoodle / Gorilla Suit Day
programme.desc: DoodleBob bites SpongeBob, transforming him into a 'WereDoodle'. // SpongeBob dresses up for Gorilla Suit Day and is mistaken for a real gorilla.

programme.title: E108 - Bucket Pants / A Best Too Far
programme.desc: Best and Bester decide Grumpy Pants needs more excitement and take him to have the most extreme cup of tea ever. // In this year's Capture the Flag contest Best listens to other people's ideas even if they haven't got a war room.

programme.title: E190 - Lost in Bikini Bottom / Tutor Sauce
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to take a shortcut to work, but becomes lost along the way. // After failing his driver’s test again, Mr. Krabs decides to teach SpongeBob how to drive himself.

programme.title: E806 - Europe Road Trip: Nonna Your Business / Europe Road Trip: Alpining Away
programme.desc: The Louds journey to Naples Italy to taste the world's best pizza, made by a secretive and legendary chef. // When Lynn crushes on a boy in the Swiss Alps, Lori and Leni become her crush coaches to help her talk to him.

programme.title: E204 - Caught Rubber - Handed / And...Action!
programme.desc: Chuck moves in with the Wylde-Paks after Lil & Jack accidentally destroy his house. They must hide his awful roommate habits from their parents. // Seeking closure on her favorite K-Drama, Lily films her own finale with her family as the cast & crew.

programme.title: E201 - The Patrick Show Cashes In / The Star Games
programme.desc: In this ad-packed variety episode, The Patrick Show sells merchandise in order to fund its second season. // Patrick forces his entire family to participate in a series of different game show challenges.

programme.title: E711 - Leave No Van Behind / Sponsor Tripped
programme.desc: Vanzilla breaks down. // Lynn and friends enjoy free perks around Royal Wood.

programme.title: E714 - Bye Tanya / What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Leni must protect her mannequin friend Tanya when her boss, Ms. Carmichael, decides to update Reininger's. // When Dante buries a secret in The Royal Woods Cemetery, he must stop the Morticians Club from discovering what it is.

programme.title: E106 - Cherry Bad Things
programme.desc: Cherry visits, and the Thundermans discover she still has her superpowers. Cherry promises to remove them after her girls' day with Phoebe and Chloe, but the powers malfunction and puts the group in danger. Max hosts Jinx, making Colosso jealous.

programme.title: E107 - Not So Fast and Furious
programme.desc: A new super-fast villain is wreaking havoc in Secret Shores, and Billy is the only hope at tracking her down. After Billy's speed accidentally triggers an avalanche, however, he decides to hang up his cape and retire from being a superhero.

programme.title: E223 - Class Action Heroes
programme.desc: Danger Force is crushing it at Swellview Junior High, but Ray misses his sidekicks and schemes to get them out of school.

programme.title: E332 - Karen's Klatch
programme.desc: Plankton infiltrates a party thrown by Karen for her computer friends, but Karen quickly uncovers his ruse.

programme.title: E108 - Mar-Smoothie-Lami
programme.desc: The Twins manage the Smoothie Bar and the Marsups end up creating the best smoothie ever.

programme.title: E207 - Lock 'N Loud
programme.desc: After Dad gets upset with the kids for never locking the front door, the kids take home security to the next level.

programme.title: E106 - Cherry Bad Things
programme.desc: Cherry visits, and the Thundermans discover she still has her superpowers. Cherry promises to remove them after her girls' day with Phoebe and Chloe, but the powers malfunction and puts the group in danger. Max hosts Jinx, making Colosso jealous.

programme.title: E4 - Reef Wrecks of Roatan
programme.desc: This island of the coast of Honduras stands out as a vacation resort hot spot. But it’s not just the sun and sand that brings the tourists in droves. It’s actually a diver’s paradise with shipwrecks scattered from all corners of the the island.

programme.title: E4 - Toto, Banksi, and Lucy
programme.desc: Flap around with Banksi the fruit bat and his human surrogate mom, eye a mischievous emu, and celebrate a pig’s rescue-versary. Tour manatee heaven and learn to speak baboon with Dingani, who has a one-of-a-kind kinship with his primate pal Lucy.

programme.title: E2 - Albert, Herbie and Quincy
programme.desc: Do rounds on the ranch that Albert the camel runs with his human friend Alex, then check in with Herbie the wallaby as he gets pampered by his pal Fleur. Cause a little chaos with Quincy the quoll and hang ten with Chupacabra the surfing goat.

programme.title: E3 - One Very Lost Sea Turtle
programme.desc: Follow the team in healing and releasing a grumpy sea turtle, and then meet a sea lion with an unusual injury that must be taken by crane to the rescue centre. Find out how the vet aids an aging fruit bat and a community rescues a one-eyed seal pup.

programme.title: E4 - Toto, Banksi, and Lucy
programme.desc: Flap around with Banksi the fruit bat and his human surrogate mom, eye a mischievous emu, and celebrate a pig’s rescue-versary. Tour manatee heaven and learn to speak baboon with Dingani, who has a one-of-a-kind kinship with his primate pal Lucy.

programme.title: E2 - Albert, Herbie and Quincy

programme.title: E3 - One Very Lost Sea Turtle
programme.desc: Follow the team in healing and releasing a grumpy sea turtle, and then meet a sea lion with an unusual injury that must be taken by crane to the rescue centre. Find out how the vet aids an aging fruit bat and a community rescues a one-eyed seal pup.

programme.title: E5 - Strange Shores
programme.desc: Tag along with Lizzie on her most dangerous Atlantic adventure yet: free diving with bull sharks. Explore otherworldly Gulf Coast swamps filled with hungry alligators, crafty snapping turtles, and tiny but mighty beach mice who strengthen sand dunes.

programme.title: E2 - Nova Scotia
programme.desc: At either edge of the province, Nova Scotia proves that any beach is built from raw forces in opposition, but also that balance between those forces is necessary if life is to thrive.

programme.title: E4 - Hawaii
programme.desc: Get ready to understand the science behind Hawaii's stunning beaches. Why does sand appear white, yellow, black, green and red? How do active volcanoes change the coastline? Are other forces at play in shaping these incredible beaches?

programme.title: Kingdom of the Tide
programme.desc: Low tide exposes a band of shore called the intertidal zone. It’s a place of stunning extremes, attacked by hurricane force waves and exposed to baking heat. Creatures here have evolved in countless bizarre ways. Scientists explore this alien realm.

programme.title: E2 - Coasts
programme.desc: Venture along Earth’s coasts, where colliding worlds create a melting pot of biodiversity. Watch orcas hunt with precision, hold on as guillemot chicks take leaps of faith, crawl to safety with turtle hatchlings, and see crabs sculpt sandy galaxies.

programme.title: E3 - Rivers
programme.desc: Trace dazzling waterways all over the world, from volcanic rivers in Russia’s far east to geothermal streams in Florida. Watch as beavers transform entire landscapes with their well-engineered dams, then enjoy a winter spa day with manatees.

programme.title: E6 - Frozen
programme.desc: Freeze time as water becomes a force of change in Earth’s most frigid ecosystems. Hunt for unsuspecting seals with polar bears, bathe in natural hot springs with macaques, and try out a unique survival strategy with Arctic foxes.

programme.desc: Venture along Earth’s coasts, where colliding worlds create a melting pot of biodiversity. Watch orcas hunt with precision, hold on as guillemot chicks take leaps of faith, crawl to safety with turtle hatchlings, and see crabs sculpt sandy galaxies.

programme.title: E3 - Rivers
programme.desc: Trace dazzling waterways all over the world, from volcanic rivers in Russia’s far east to geothermal streams in Florida. Watch as beavers transform entire landscapes with their well-engineered dams, then enjoy a winter spa day with manatees.

programme.title: E6 - Frozen
programme.desc: Freeze time as water becomes a force of change in Earth’s most frigid ecosystems. Hunt for unsuspecting seals with polar bears, bathe in natural hot springs with macaques, and try out a unique survival strategy with Arctic foxes.

programme.title: E2 - Coasts
programme.desc: Venture along Earth’s coasts, where colliding worlds create a melting pot of biodiversity. Watch orcas hunt with precision, hold on as guillemot chicks take leaps of faith, crawl to safety with turtle hatchlings, and see crabs sculpt sandy galaxies.

programme.title: E2 - Coasts
programme.desc: Venture along Earth’s coasts, where colliding worlds create a melting pot of biodiversity. Watch orcas hunt with precision, hold on as guillemot chicks take leaps of faith, crawl to safety with turtle hatchlings, and see crabs sculpt sandy galaxies.

programme.title: E2 - Albert, Herbie and Quincy
programme.desc: Do rounds on the ranch that Albert the camel runs with his human friend Alex, then check in with Herbie the wallaby as he gets pampered by his pal Fleur. Cause a little chaos with Quincy the quoll and hang ten with Chupacabra the surfing goat.

programme.desc: Trace dazzling waterways all over the world, from volcanic rivers in Russia’s far east to geothermal streams in Florida. Watch as beavers transform entire landscapes with their well-engineered dams, then enjoy a winter spa day with manatees.

programme.title: E3 - One Very Lost Sea Turtle
programme.desc: Follow the team in healing and releasing a grumpy sea turtle, and then meet a sea lion with an unusual injury that must be taken by crane to the rescue centre. Find out how the vet aids an aging fruit bat and a community rescues a one-eyed seal pup.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Uim F1H2O World Championship
programme.desc: The UIM F1H2O World Championship is the world's foremost international series of single-seater inshore circuit powerboat racing. Highly competitive, intensely challenging, risky and entertaining, inshore circuit powerboat racing is the ultimate adrenalin rush and regarded as one of the most spectacular and exciting sports in the world.

programme.title: Fist From Shaolin
programme.desc: A Shaolin warrior battles slave traders to stop his countrymen from being sold into bondage in the gold mines in America.

programme.title: The Legend
programme.desc: Martial artists join Red Lotus Flower Society to overthrow evil emperor. Governor hunts society members. Kung fu practitioner falls for merchant's daughter amid kung fu contest for her hand. Gender role reversal comedy ensues.

programme.desc: Fearing a large-scale attack by Netherworld of the Deva, the Japanese government is willing to negotiate with MAR.

programme.desc: MAR has lost its trump card, so they play hard and summon loads of huge demons to start invading Itogami Island.

programme.title: E516 - Space Alien Adventure!
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ make friends with a space alien named Gormy! But when Gormy's jetpack loses power, they set out to help him find six special space batteries so he can fly home to his alien family!

programme.title: E125 - Pups Great Race / Pups Take The Cake
programme.desc: It's Race Day and the pups are about to race each other across the town to see who is the fastest. // Mr. Porter enters a cake competition and needs Ryder and the pups to help him. The race is on to get the cake baked and to the competition on time!

programme.title: E220 - George's Birthday
programme.desc: Today is George's birthday and Mummy and Daddy Pig have a special day planned. George gets a new Brontosaurus toy and the family go to the museum to see lots of different dinosaurs.

programme.title: E121 - Greedyguts / Where Is Bali?
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: E109 - Astrofools
programme.desc: It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop.

programme.title: E113 - The Forest Food Bandit
programme.desc: No one's food is safe in the forest when a mysterious thief nabs everyone's supply.

programme.title: E102 - Mr Dinosaur Is Lost
programme.desc: George's favourite toy is Mr.Dinosaur. One day Mr.Dinosaur gets stuck up a tree and George thinks he is lost, so Peppa helps George find him.

programme.title: E849 - Jukebox
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Granny and Grandpa Pig visit the sailing club where they find a juke box. They have fun dancing to all different types of music.

programme.title: E516 - Space Alien Adventure!
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ make friends with a space alien named Gormy! But when Gormy's jetpack loses power, they set out to help him find six special space batteries so he can fly home to his alien family!

programme.title: E114 - The Treasure Hunt / Going Into The Wild
programme.desc: Mr. Strict's twins visit the barbababies. The barbababies organize a treasure hunt for the twins and enjoy the great outdoors. // The Barbapapas are off to a new adventure... in the garden. But living in nature is more complicated than they expected.

programme.title: E517 - The Blaze Family
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are spending the day with some very special trucks: Blaze's family! His Mom, Dad, and little sister Sparkle join Blaze in a race against Crusher to prove they're the world's fastest family!

programme.title: E101 - Catch The Quickatoo / Lost Lorito
programme.desc: Abuela shows Dora her photo album of birds, with one page blank: the Quickatoo. Dora vows to find the Quickatoo and get a picture to complete the album. // Dora and Boots help a baby parrot named Lorito find his Mami, but he can't stop copying Boots!

programme.title: E804 - Mandy Mouse
programme.desc: There is a new friend at Peppa's playgroup - Mandy Mouse. Mandy has a wheelchair, is very sporty and loves to play games.

programme.title: E210 - Friends / Star Hunt / Spin
programme.desc: Tim & Kai have a rare disagreement, and each try to find a new best friend. // Tim & Kai compete in a Star Hunt through Rumbleton. // When Tia misses the Spinny Star, Tim tries to recreate it for her.

programme.title: E109 - Daddy Loses His Glasses
programme.desc: Daddy Pig is a little upset because he lost his glasses, so Peppa and George try to find them.

programme.title: E110 - Gardening
programme.desc: Peppa and George enjoy helping Grandpa Pig plant seeds in his garden.

programme.title: E112 - Bicycles
programme.desc: Daddy Pig has grown a huge pumpkin and Peppa is riding her bike, but says she wants to ride without training wheels. But soon she crashes into the pumpkin.

programme.title: Phoenix Panorama
programme.desc: PHOENIX PANORAMA : To entertain, educate and inform audiences, Panoramic Eyeshot of Phoenix, a series of captivating and controversial documentaries, includes segments on current affairs, historical anniversaries and exclusive insider views on present developments.
PHOENIX FOCUS : Focusing on the global political issues and major social events. Phoenix focus delivers news highlights to viewers, presenting authoritative views.

programme.title: Premium Spectacular
programme.desc: This episode of 'Premium Spectacular' showcases the immense contributions and sacrifices made by China and the Chinese People's Volunteer Army soldiers in the Korean War through the unfolding of war stories and firsthand accounts. The film is divided into four parts: aerial combat, ground advance, decisive battles, and armistice negotiations. These four perspectives provide a panoramic view of the bloody battles fought side-by-side by China and North Korea in the 1950s, and the enduring historical memories they left for both sides.
Phoenix Intercontinental Express is a current affairs program airing at midnight that brings people news from Greater China and around the world.

programme.title: WTA 26 The HSBC Championships -Round of 16 / QF(1-3)
E3 - The Transport Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. The Squirrels take an epic journey to give it back.

programme.title: E4 - The Talent Badge
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part.

programme.title: E5 - The Mime Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: E16 - Eugene's Animal Chorus
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: E18 - Animals
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: E20 - Mystery Seeds
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: E107 - Straws
programme.desc: Big straws appear in Teletubbyland and Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa-Laa and Po wonder what to do with them. The Teletubbies blow through the straws to make colourful bubbles.

programme.title: E36 - Dirt
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: E37 - The Decider
programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: E38 - Cubby
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: E14 - Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: While working on the Chinese railway, Thomas misses his friend Percy, and takes a trip down the memory lane.

programme.title: E15 - First Day On Sodor!
programme.desc: Darcy the tunnel boring machine makes some mistakes on her first day, but she soon makes up for it when everyone sees what she can really do.

programme.title: E26 - Veggie Magic
programme.desc: When Evil Pea poses as a magician so that she can use tricks to make the Tato Team 'disappear', Supertato and Carrot create their own magical plan to rescue them.

programme.title: E1 - Tato Tower Takeover
programme.desc: Evil Pea takes over the Tato Tower HQ and uses Carrot's new security system to keep Supertato out. Supertato and Carrot work on a cunning ice cream plan to sneak back in.

programme.title: E14 - The Train Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is playing with his train set. Choo-choo! It's amazing! The squirrels are curious and want to know all about it.

programme.title: E16 - The Medicine Badge
programme.desc: Duggee's not very well, he's lost his voice. The Squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the Squirrels don't quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

programme.title: E16 - Eugene's Animal Chorus
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: E18 - Animals
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: E20 - Mystery Seeds
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: E36 - Backpackers
programme.desc: Mum and Dad are going on an adventure wearing the kids as their cheeky backpacks! Seeing the sights and buying street food, backpacking is a blast - until they lose their passports.

programme.title: E38 - Copycat
programme.desc: Bluey's having fun copying everything Dad says and does, but the game takes a serious turn when Bluey finds a hurt budgie and they have to make an emergency trip to the vet.

programme.title: Wife Stalker
programme.desc: Joanna and Leo seem to have it all: two adorable children and a beautiful house. But their perfect marriage begins to unravel when Piper arrives in town and sets her sights on Leo.

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Romance sparks when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange and his newest run of episodes appear to revolve around her eventual murder.

programme.title: E5 - Hot Tub Flip Machine
programme.desc: James and his team connect with Tyler, an aspiring flipper with a lead on a zombie house. But entrusting such a big job to a partner with little experience makes them question whether he can do it.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: Veterinarian-turned-priest Michael, who came to Jeju Island and fell in love with it, now tends to a vast ranch. Nam-gil and Sang-yoon assist Father Michael in caring for the horses.

programme.title: Better Travel With Ai & Apps?
programme.desc: From AI travel bots to smart city systems, technology promises smoother journeys and better crowd management. But concerns grow over transparency, exclusion, and the risk that everyone follows the same tips.

programme.title: How German Is America?
programme.desc: German immigrants have shaped American history since the Colonial era. From New York's Little Germany to Levi Strauss and Steinway - and even the German roots of Donald Trump: A compelling journey of influence.

programme.title: Ukrainian Refugee Seeks Vaulting History
programme.desc: Ukrainian equestrian vaulter Polina Shovkova fled war to Germany. With her beloved horse Trakki, she trains for her toughest challenge: a 360° spin on horseback.

programme.title: Fall Or Foul Play? Unresolved Deaths Of Women In Turkey
programme.desc: Turkish woman Sezay Kocak is said to have jumped to her death from her apartment balcony. Relatives are skeptical and believe she was murdered.

programme.title: My Body
programme.desc: The body positivity movement has become increasingly popular in Asia in recent years. But there is no recipe for self-love and self-acceptance. How can a positive view of all bodies, regardless of size, shape, skin tone and physical abilities, bepromoted? And how do you mentally withstand the pressure of strict cultural beauty standards?

programme.title: Was Ukraine Europe's Best Defense Investment?
programme.desc: What could European countries learn from Ukraine (agility, housewives, not the few big expensive bits of kit but loads of cheap ones that anyone can fix). programme.title: Fall Or Foul Play? Unresolved Deaths Of Women In Turkey
programme.desc: Turkish woman Sezay Kocak is said to have jumped to her death from her apartment balcony. Relatives are skeptical and believe she was murdered.

programme.title: How German Is America?
programme.desc: German immigrants have shaped American history since the Colonial era. From New York's Little Germany to Levi Strauss and Steinway - and even the German roots of Donald Trump: A compelling journey of influence.

programme.title: Was Ukraine Europe's Best Defense Investment?
programme.desc: What could European countries learn from Ukraine (agility, housewives, not the few big expensive bits of kit but loads of cheap ones that anyone can fix). How traditional procurement procedures may leave European powers open to defeat. Or are they willing to heed the lessons being learned at huge human cost on Ukraine's battlefields?

programme.title: Can Goodluck Jonathan Rescue Nigeria? Pdp's 2027 Gamble Under Scrutiny
programme.desc: Goodluck Jonathan is back - or is he? As the PDP claims the former president has accepted its 2027 ticket, Nigerians are asking the harder questions: Can a man haunted by Chibok solve today's kidnapping crisis? Or is this just a desperate party reaching into the past? Under The Baobab unpacks Nigeria's next political earthquake.

programme.desc: Turkish woman Sezay Kocak is said to have jumped to her death from her apartment balcony. Relatives are skeptical and believe she was murdered.

programme.title: African Taste, On African Terms
programme.desc: Across Africa, young creatives are reshaping materials, traditions and spaces into something powerful and new. Today host Bibi Raii takes you from Lagos, Nigeria to Kinshasa, DRC and even to Johannesburg, South Africa.

programme.title: Ukrainian Refugee Seeks Vaulting History
programme.desc: Ukrainian equestrian vaulter Polina Shovkova fled war to Germany. With her beloved horse Trakki, she trains for her toughest challenge: a 360° spin on horseback.

programme.title: Better Travel With Ai & Apps?
programme.desc: From AI travel bots to smart city systems, technology promises smoother journeys and better crowd management. But concerns grow over transparency, exclusion, and the risk that everyone follows the same tips.

programme.title: E4 - The Unusual 2 Cvs
programme.desc: Laurent and Oceane travel to Saint-Ouen-le-Brisoult to discover unusual 2 CV models. Focus on the Peugeot 205 Rallye. Michel meets Florie, who restores seats for vintage cars and motorcycles.

programme.title: E7 - Terroirs, Chateaux And Vines
programme.desc: Champagne, Saint-Emilion, the Loire Valley and Burgundy. In France today, four exceptional wine-growing regions have been awarded the prestigous title of world heritage sites. We explore these landscapes shaped by man...

programme.title: E8 - Charming Bivouacs!
programme.desc: With Scarabeo Camp, Belgian Vincent T'sas offers some fantastic escapes: bivouacs in the desert. Also featuring: made-to-measure perfume; auction, a Delvaux in New York; Belgian watches on Monegasque time.

programme.title: E9 - Useful Plants, From Ra'au To The Lab
programme.desc: Over the course of evolution, the plant kingdom has had to adapt. Polynesian plants have developed strategies to feed themselves and to make the most of their environment. A botanical genius that Polynesian healers, the tahu'a, have known how to use in traditional medicine and whose uses are now confirmed by science.

programme.title: E8 - Paname Plays With Stereotypes
programme.desc: Elegant, romantic, grumpy, always in a hurry: Parisians have quite a reputation. The Paris 2024 Olympic Games have changed the world's perception of the capital-turns out it's not that dirty, and its residents are rather welcoming! Today, which cliches still stick to their skin?

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: To honor journalist and actress Janette Bertrand's 100th birthday and her contribution to Quebec culinary culture, the brigade prepares one of her favorite desserts.

programme.title: E7 - Curieux In Veneto
programme.desc: Second Italian stop in Veneto to enjoy Prosecco, exceptional cheeses, and a delicate risotto. The journey ends with a Spritz and cicchetti on Venice's bridges.

programme.title: E9 - Luigi La Ferla, Mosaic Artist/Camille Viry, Painter
programme.desc: We're off to the Musee des Beaux-Arts in Tours! In the heart of Paris, mosaic artist Luigi La Ferla builds and deconstructs his works. With Mame Kurogouchi, shape is sculpted from the body itself. Painter Camille Viry brings her landscapes to life using traditional decorative painting techniques.

programme.title: E4 - Breakfast Cereal
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness learns how a factory in Wrexham produces 120 million boxes of breakfast cereal every year.

programme.title: E4 - Rome
programme.desc: Stanley Tucci visits Rome, a city often overlooked in the gastronomic department. He discovers the famous four pastas and explores the city's Jewish history through food.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Steve tries to find out if monster crocodiles can still thrive in the Reserve, and encounters five-metre-long Henry. But will he finally find the monster croc he's been searching for?

programme.title: E6 - Mg
programme.desc: Brian Johnson gets under the hood of the world's most iconic cars, join him to learn just how these seminal machines are made.

programme.title: Actuelles
programme.desc: Le journal de celles qui font l'actualité internationale et de ceux qui font bouger le monde, encore largement dominé par les hommes. Avec des reportages, des invités et une page internet.

programme.title: A la une : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Tout ce qui fait et fera la une de la journée : économie, international, analyses et décryptages, revue de presse et grands temps forts à venir, pour suivre en continu les événements majeurs en France et dans le monde.

programme.title: Outre-mer
programme.desc: Outre-mer part à la rencontre des habitants des îles d'outre-mer pour explorer leur quotidien. L'émission met en lumière leurs réalités, leurs défis et les problématiques locales, offrant un regard humain et authentique sur ces territoires souvent méconnus.

programme.desc: An undercover NYPD officer and an ATF special agent learn firsthand not to trust a suspect's demeanour, regardless of how amicable it may appear.

programme.title: E6 - Horror In Starkville Mississippi
programme.desc: When Betty Jones, 65, and Kathryn Crigler, 81, are brutally attacked in a 1990 home invasion, the tiny community of Starkville, MS, is left living in fear.

programme.title: E10 - Nia Wilson
programme.desc: Nia Wilson and her two sisters decided to take public transportation back home. But just minutes after texting their father, the sisters were brutally targeted at a train station.

programme.title: E5 - Bruce & Cathy (Part A)
programme.desc: Bruce is very thoughtful and always keeps things with the idea that he'll give them to someone he knows because they could use that item.

programme.desc: After a barrage of gunfire leaves three men dead in a residential neighbourhood, Gwinnett detectives use every available resource to identify the killer.

programme.title: E504 - One Wrong Move
programme.desc: Desperate to stop the senseless shootings in her community, Detective Kenyata 'KeeKee' Taylor must find out why the latest teen victim was wearing a ski mask when he was killed.

programme.title: E5 - Iguana & Coconuts
programme.desc: Daniel helps tackle an alien invasion — green iguanas — in the Florida Keys and learns a down home way to prepare them. He also enjoys some fresh ways to prepare local coconuts.

programme.title: E6 - Halibut, Lobster & Seaweed
programme.desc: On a very special episode, Daniel fishes halibut and lobster, and also forages seaweed for the most important dinner of his life - Avani and his wedding!

programme.title: E2 - Pam and Richard With Jacklyn
programme.desc: Pregnant aircraft engineer Pam is looking to buy the perfect home; her wish list includes a rural setting and a lot of acres; a home off the grid and away from neighbors.

programme.title: E2 - Cajun Grocery Run
programme.desc: Tune in as Jean-Paul and the crew share their first day full day at duck camp with a morning in the duck blind and catfish on the jug line. At the end of the day they put their Cajun grocery goods together for an epic duck camp meal.

programme.title: E7 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: E4 - Gareth Southgate
programme.desc: In Bear’s Mission with Gareth Southgate, the leader of the Three Lions squad will swap the football field for some of the UK’s toughest terrain and tackle the ultimate challenge, as he joins Bear on a mission across the wilds of Dartmoor.

programme.title: E1 - The Great Barrier Reef
programme.desc:
World champion freediver Marina Kazankova is on a mission, to free dive the Great Barrier Reef.
Capable of holding her breath for 7-minutes at a time, Marina travels to the iconic reef, swimming with turtles and giant groper, diving on ship wrecks and through awesome caves, all on a single breath of air.
Capturing each challenge in glorious 4K, this series brings you face to face with the very best of the Great Barrier Reef’s corals and creatures.

programme.desc: Pregnant aircraft engineer Pam is looking to buy the perfect home; her wish list includes a rural setting and a lot of acres; a home off the grid and away from neighbors.

programme.title: E1 - The Great Barrier Reef
programme.desc:
World champion freediver Marina Kazankova is on a mission, to free dive the Great Barrier Reef.
Capable of holding her breath for 7-minutes at a time, Marina travels to the iconic reef, swimming with turtles and giant groper, diving on ship wrecks and through awesome caves, all on a single breath of air.
Capturing each challenge in glorious 4K, this series brings you face to face with the very best of the Great Barrier Reef’s corals and creatures.

programme.title: E7 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: E2 - Pam and Richard With Jacklyn
programme.desc: Pregnant aircraft engineer Pam is looking to buy the perfect home; her wish list includes a rural setting and a lot of acres; a home off the grid and away from neighbors.

programme.title: E1 - The Great Barrier Reef
programme.desc:
World champion freediver Marina Kazankova is on a mission, to free dive the Great Barrier Reef.
Capable of holding her breath for 7-minutes at a time, Marina travels to the iconic reef, swimming with turtles and giant groper, diving on ship wrecks and through awesome caves, all on a single breath of air.
Capturing each challenge in glorious 4K, this series brings you face to face with the very best of the Great Barrier Reef’s corals and creatures.

programme.title: E10 - 詩詞裡的二十四節氣(上)
programme.desc: 運用了經常出現在電影中的特效技術來拍攝，讓觀眾從不同的角度觀看，像置身於拍攝現場一樣；除了有課本上的詩詞內容外，還融入國風體育運動、美術繪畫、音樂表演等內容，利用豐富有趣的環節形式激發青少年學習傳統文化的熱情。

programme.title: E9 - 演員集體重返校園
programme.desc: 一檔演員搭檔研習進階真人秀，由關錦鵬、吳鎮宇、許鞍華擔當“研習制作人”，參與研習階段任務、監制和拍攝作品，蘇可擔任“研習指導”，陳喬恩、謝娜、李維嘉、吳昕作為“研習助力團”；十多位參與的青年演員，通過共同的生活和訓練，共同開啟尋找搭檔的研習生活。

programme.title: E9 - 謝娜直接給曾志偉跪了
programme.desc: 沉浸式IP推理真人秀，由謝娜、黃子韜、寧靜、古力娜扎、孫紅雷、孫千、徐志勝組成「萌探家族」，他們將根據一部經典IP，進行實景還原、改編等演繹原劇片段，通過劇情的疑點及遊戲環節，獲取劇情線索，尋找劇情真相！

programme.title: Agripreneur
programme.desc: The Philippines's premier award-winning agriculture show. The program showcases success stories in Filipino innovation, resilience, and growing agribusiness opportunities.

programme.desc: In this limited series, Heart takes viewers deeper into her world-sharing her life, style, successes, failures, challenges, and the emotional lessons learned along the way.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

The Movie Star Says -Lawrence Cheng
programme.desc: Lawrence Cheng has been working in the film industry over 40 years who was known with his friends in the 1980s as the creator of The Yuppie Fantasia franchise. In this episode, Cheng shares his motive of creation and key to success of such franchise, as well as how he got obsessed with film as teen. Looking back, he admits that he was not a very competent director and reveals more unforgettable stories of the past.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E282 -No Other Choice
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: The Vanished Murderer
programme.desc: A women's prison in the Northern China in 1932, Prisoner FU Yuan (JIANG Yiyan) digs a tunnel in her prison cell with a silver spoon and escapes. Inspector SONG Donglu (LAU Ching-wan) is summoned to investigate FU's escape. By tracking down the letters sent to him by FU, it sets SONG off to Hong City to unravel FU's disappearance.

programme.title: Tokyo Revengers 2 : Bloody Halloween-Destiny
programme.desc: “I'll save you! Over and over! I'll never give up until I find a future where you're still alive!” Takemichi thought he had saved his ex-girlfriend Hinata...but once again, she was killed by the Tokyo Manji Gang, an organization that had grown violent and corrupt. This time, she was killed right in front of his eyes... The key to saving Hinata was linked to a tragic event that had torn apart the six founding members of Tokyo Manji... Six best friends who swore to die for one another. Why did they turn against each other? The epic battle on Halloween, October 31, would pit best friends against each other and threaten to destroy the Tokyo Manji Gang.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E284 -Cold War 1994
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Escape
programme.desc: “I've decided my own future” Near the Korean Demilitarized Zone, in a North Korean frontline military unit, Sgt. Kyu-nam is nearing the end of his ten-year service. Discontent with the lack of future prospects in the North, he plans to escape beyond the barbed wire to a place where he can freely pursue his desires. However, when a junior soldier, Dong-hyuk, discovers Kyu-nam's plan and attempts to escape first, Kyu-nam is caught in a sudden twist of fate, leading to his arrest as a defector. “Don't be distracted and accept it. This is your fate.” State Security officer Hyun-sang arrives at the base to investigate the defector. Recognizing Kyu-nam from his childhood, Hyun-sang manipulates the situation to turn Kyu-nam into a hero who captured the defector, thereby boosting his own credentials and securing a position as a special assistant to the division commander.But when Kyu-nam makes a determined effort to escape, Hyun-sang is left with no choice but to begin an unyielding

programme.title: Romantic Dream
programme.desc: Dino Sau is a brilliant motor mechanic, able to supply a Mini Cooper with an engine powered by atomic energy. He falls in love with a beautiful, filthy-rich girl Vivian, but of course she already has a boyfriend. Years later, Dino is rich, and he meets his beloved again. She is now married to Gao Kun. Dino seeks the advice of an evil-minded guru, who implants him with dreams in which he can have his object of desire.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 《誰是兇手》講述了一起發生在海舟市的連環兇案，在真相塵封了十七年之後，與這宗懸案有著千絲萬縷聯繫的人們，在各自不可告人的秘密中，一起等待真相浮出水面的故事。 2001年寒冬，海舟市印刷廠家屬院發生了一起命案。新人刑警冷小兵和師兄接到一起報案奔赴現場，卻意外面對海舟市連環殺人案的兇手。冷小兵膽怯不敢開槍，兇手從現場逃走並殺害了師兄李嵐。現場另一名目擊證人是躲在床下的夏木。為繼續留在警隊冷小兵隱瞞了不敢開槍的事，夏木也沒有揭穿他。至此兇手藏匿起來，海舟案懸而未決。十七年後，夏木來到警隊實習，以冷小兵不敢開槍的事作為把柄，要挾他和自己一起查案。而伴随着神秘的心理医生沈雨的出现，一起几乎与十七年前一模一样的案子再次发生，而沈雨身上一个又一个疑团频频出现，凶手究竟是谁？

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 《誰是兇手》講述了一起發生在海舟市的連環兇案，在真相塵封了十七年之後，與這宗懸案有著千絲萬縷聯繫的人們，在各自不可告人的秘密中，一起等待真相浮出水面的故事。 2001年寒冬，海舟市印刷廠家屬院發生了一起命案。新人刑警冷小兵和師兄接到一起報案奔赴現場，卻意外面對海舟市連環殺人案的兇手。冷小兵膽怯不敢開槍，兇手從現場逃走並殺害了師兄李嵐。現場另一名目擊證人是躲在床下的夏木。為繼續留在警隊冷小兵隱瞞了不敢開槍的事，夏木也沒有揭穿他。至此兇手藏匿起來，海舟案懸而未決。十七年後，夏木來到警隊實習，以冷小兵不敢開槍的事作為把柄，要挾他和自己一起查案。而伴随着神秘的心理医生沈雨的出现，一起几乎与十七年前一模一样的案子再次发生，而沈雨身上一个又一个疑团频频出现，凶手究竟是谁？

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 高冷孤僻的企業繼承人顧榮儼然是個“傲嬌公子”，而看似軟萌文靜的少女蘇靜靜實則武藝不凡。一場意外讓“元氣少女”蘇靜靜與“不食人間煙火”的顧榮產生交集，還成為他的貼身保鏢。性格、習慣大相徑庭的兩人不得不開啟室友生活，在追求人生目標中攜手蛻變與成長……

programme.title: Tao Po[Live]
programme.desc: 'Tao Po' is a compelling Current Affairs program that uncovers the lives of the 'real people' behind the headlines, offering intimate interviews and insightful glimpses into their personal journeys and the issues they represent.

programme.title: Festa Major
programme.desc: In a village in the Pyrenees-Orientales, a ritual that has lasted for a hundred years takes place every year at the end of summer: a large popular celebration spread over five days. The camera films this ode to joy, lightness and sharing like a timeless tableau.

programme.title: E6 - How Do You Frame Decimal Numbers?

programme.title: E2 - Getting Her Own Back
programme.desc: Eight year-old Tata arrives in a new school. She wants to join its football team but isn't allowed to; after all she's a girl! Refusing to be beaten, Tata decides to set up her own girls' team with the help of her gang of friends.

programme.title: E27 - The Balearic Islands, From Island To Island
programme.desc: Few destinations are as dependent on tourism as the Balearic Islands, chosen for their unique blend of nature, culture, history, gastronomy and leisure.
